overall.description: A static cinematic view of a medieval castle common room (Gryffindor common room from Hogwarts Legacy), featuring Gothic architecture with stone walls, wooden beams, red tapestries, and a burning fireplace. Students in dark robes move through the space while warm natural light streams through tall arched windows. The scene is rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with detailed textures and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with seating areas and fireplace

events.description: two students in dark robes enter from the center background and walk toward the foreground, passing through the main seating area
a single student walks from the center background toward the camera, exiting the frame at the bottom

agents.ego_description: stationary camera positioned near the fireplace, observing the common room and passing students

notable_agents.action: two students walking together from the background toward the foreground, passing the central table
students sitting on the red leather sofa near the windows, conversing

entered.detail: large medieval stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantelpiece
tall red and gold tapestries hanging on the stone wall behind the main seating area
tall Gothic arched windows with multiple panes allowing natural light to flood the room
red leather sofas arranged in a seating area near the windows
large patterned rug covering the central floor area with intricate designs
exposed dark wooden beams supporting the high vaulted ceiling
iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Gryffindor common room from a position near the fireplace. The Gothic interior features stone walls, red tapestries, and tall arched windows on the right. Students in Hogwarts robes move through the space - two walk from the background toward the camera around the 22-second mark, while others remain seated on the red leather sofas. Warm light from the fireplace mixes with natural afternoon light streaming through the windows, illuminating the ornate rug and wooden ceiling beams.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a cozy medieval common room where warm hearth-light blends with soft afternoon sun. It begins with a wide view of the Gothic interior, capturing the interplay of light across stone walls, red tapestries, and heavy wooden ceiling beams. As the camera lingers, the space feels lived-in with students resting on red leather sofas and others drifting through the room. The scene then focuses on the movement of two students in dark robes as they walk from the background toward the foreground, crossing the ornate rug. Finally, the view settles on the atmospheric harmony of the room, where the glow of the fireplace meets the natural light streaming through tall arched windows.
